input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.3.1
            TITLE: cost report

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.3.1: Cost Report
S.3.3.1 Cost Report 
Preparation and submission of a report (the “Cost Report”)

final_answer: rule S.3.3.1: Cost Report S.3.3.1 Cost Report Preparation and submission of a report (the “Cost Report”)
